_metadata.source: Templatized from production Retell inbound agent config
_metadata.instructions: Replace all {{VARIABLES}} before importing to Retell. Fields marked with RETELL_AUTO are generated automatically by Retell when you create the agent -- do not set them manually.

_template_variables.AGENT_NAME: Display name for the agent (e.g., 'Sunrise Dental Receptionist')
_template_variables.WEBHOOK_URL: Your post-call webhook URL (e.g., n8n webhook or backend endpoint)
_template_variables.VOICE_ID: Retell voice ID -- see prompt-engineering-elevenlabs.md for recommended voices, or use Retell built-in voices (e.g., '11labs-Susan')
_template_variables.SYSTEM_PROMPT: Paste the full system prompt from retell-prompts/inbound-system-prompt.md after customizing it

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_first_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: Caller's first name as stated during the call

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_last_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: Caller's last name as stated during the call

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_email
post_call_analysis_data.description: Email address if provided during the call

post_call_analysis_data.name: callback_number
post_call_analysis_data.description: Preferred callback number if different from caller ID

post_call_analysis_data.name: service_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Type of service the caller inquired about

post_call_analysis_data.name: is_existing_client
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether the caller identified themselves as an existing client

post_call_analysis_data.name: appointment_datetime
post_call_analysis_data.description: Booked appointment date and time in ISO 8601 format, if scheduled

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_sentiment
post_call_analysis_data.description: Overall caller sentiment observed during the call

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_summary
post_call_analysis_data.description: 2-3 sentence summary covering the caller's situation, what was discussed, and the outcome
examples: Caller inquired about teeth cleaning services. Qualified and scheduled appointment for Friday at 2pm.

post_call_analysis_data.name: qualified_lead
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether the caller qualifies as a lead based on service match and interest level

post_call_analysis_data.name: requested_callback
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether the caller requested a callback

post_call_analysis_data.name: raw_callback_time
post_call_analysis_data.description: The specific date, time, or timeframe the caller requested for a callback. Leave empty if no specific callback time was discussed.

post_call_analysis_data.name: transfer_attempted
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether the agent attempted to transfer the call to another person

general_tools.name: transfer_call
general_tools.description: Transfer the call to a staff member or office number. Use the appropriate phone number from your context. Always warn the caller before transferring.

transfer_destination.prompt: Use the transfer number from your conversation context. The number must be in E.164 format (e.g. +13125551234).

general_tools.name: end_call
general_tools.description: End the call when the caller says goodbye or you are instructed to do so.

general_tools.name: book_appointment
general_tools.description: Book an appointment. Use after collecting all required information (first_name, last_name, date, time) and confirming the date and time with the caller.
general_tools.execution_message_description: Ask them to wait while you book the appointment

date.description: Appointment date as MM/DD/YYYY (e.g. 02/15/2026). Must be in the future.

time.description: Appointment time as H:MM AM/PM (e.g. 2:00 PM)

notes.description: Brief summary of what the appointment is for

general_tools.name: check_availability
general_tools.description: Check available appointment times. Use before offering time slots to the caller.

date.description: The date to check availability for, as MM/DD/YYYY

llm.begin_message: Hi, thank you for calling {{COMPANY_NAME}}. This is {{AGENT_NAME}}, how can I help you today?
